summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard capture of a standout night on the 1987 tour
review: The recording delivers an exceptionally clean and crisp board mix that showcases one of the most enjoyable shows of this 1987 tour. Reviewers praise the fun setlist and note it as one of the best nights, making both the performance and audio quality highly appealing.

ai_rating.rationale: A single detailed 5‑star review highlights an excellent soundboard recording and a top‑tier performance, warranting a near‑exceptional rating despite limited data points.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crystal‑clear, clean mix with no noticeable flaws; the board sounds very sharp and well balanced.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Setlist is described as fun and one of the best nights of the tour, indicating strong pacing and flow.
